title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE INUDARAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF MARANTAO, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL SUR, TO SULTAN GURO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3206 / 59 OG No. 48, 8213 (December 2, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3722, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE INUDARAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF MARANTAO, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL SUR, TO SULTAN GURO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Inudaran Elementary School in the Municipal District of Marantao, Province of Lanao del Sur, is changed to Sultan Guro Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
